description_long: This apartment building features a distinctive V-shaped footprint with three visible stories, each equipped with wide, angular balconies that wrap around the structure. The roof is a prominent, pitched design clad in reddish-brown tiles, giving the building a warm, Mediterranean appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color, contrasting with the darker window frames and balcony undersides. Windows are arranged in a regular, horizontal pattern across each floor, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The ground level includes multiple entrances, some recessed beneath the overhanging balconies, and the building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and masonry. The overall design is functional yet visually striking, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A three-story, V-shaped apartment building with wide, angular balconies, a red-tiled pitched roof, and regularly spaced windows on a light facade.
description_view_0: This view highlights the narrow end of the V-shape, showing the stacked balconies and the prominent pitched roof.
description_view_1: The long side of the building is visible, displaying the full extent of the balconies and the regular window arrangement across all floors.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end of the V-shape is shown, emphasizing the angular balconies and the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: This view presents the open angle of the V, revealing the main facade with multiple balconies and entrances beneath the overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in horizontal rows on each floor, evenly spaced and aligned vertically, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
